'''Greenstalk''' trees were native to the rainforests of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. The froglike creatures called [[Wuorl]] lived in the branches of the Greenstalk trees.

{{Flora-stub}}
